$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for review-agent responses (Story 7.2-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: ReviewAgentResponse
description: Structured result returned by a review agent dispatched by the orchestrator.

approval_status.description: Reviewer verdict on the pull request.

change_count.description: Number of changes the reviewer requested or applied.

final_status.description: Terminal state of the review stage.
